title: Anonymity
body:
### Stay Anonym
Anonymity is a server side mod that obfuscate names of invisible entities in deaths messages.

**The mod obfuscate :**
- the names of invisible entities
- the names of custom items (held by invisibles entites)

**Some Exemples of ingame Obduscated messages :**
  
  ![the death message when the attacker is invisible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97d3daaaf4d0b4c0dc0a37b3fd9715d40e0155e9.png)
  ![the death message when someone get killed while Invisible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce1918d62ccb8d741e16dd769bd6f0d1ff2dcdc.png)
